ah right tulu's exalt doesnt do dmg i was thinking of the crit rate being upgraded to like +30%
People who actually do something with their exalt like doing damage and such Tulu gets no benefit cause he again his exalt doesn't actually do any damage or shielding etc.
Ahh lmao
does it not stack with it?
so he gets like 55 crit or smnth (forgot how many he gets in his exalt)
No it doesn't the bonus is applied directly to whatever your exalt is doing
Like how paradox is tied to the cards, it doesn't actually show up in your character's stats
So your cards get the bonuses from paradox but nothing else nor does their exalt does
While chamber 36 is just for exalt
Basically the crit bonuses from that set don't do anything if the character doesn't actually do any damage with their exalt
